dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8193 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 189 East Main Street in Xenia, Ohio, as the “Gilman Gil Whitney Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Turner of Ohio (for himself, Mrs. Beatty, Mr. Balderson, Ms. Brown, Mr. Carey, Mr. Davidson, Mr. Jordan, Mr. Joyce of Ohio, Ms. Kaptur, Mr. Landsman, Mr. Latta, Mr. Miller of Ohio, Mr. Rulli, Mrs. Sykes, and Mr. Taylor) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 189 East Main Street in Xenia, Ohio, as the Gilman Gil Whitney Post Office Building.

section.header: Gilman Gil Whitney Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 189 East Main Street in Xenia, Ohio, shall be known and designated as the Gilman Gil Whitney Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Gilman Gil Whitney Post Office Building.
